title: centaurea boissieri var. beltranii
intro: Centaurea boissieri var. beltranii, also known as Beltran's knapweed, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, inflammation, and fever. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Centaurea boissieri var. beltranii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
